title: Anyone ever feel like your in an EVA characters shoes
display_title: Anyone ever feel like your in an EVA characters shoes
wikitext:
[]: Anyone ever feel like your in an EVA character's shoes?             Quote Post by Shadow » Tue Nov 08, 2005 5:25 pm Just wondering if anyones ever felt like that, it happens to me a lot. Oh...BTW, this is my first post so...hi.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 5:28 pm Hi. Please introduce yourself some more in the off-topic forum. And it's not surprising to feel that way - that's part of what makes NGE such a classic, managing to get realistically screwed up people. For me, I could recognise a lot of my younger self in Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Tue Nov 08, 2005 5:31 pm I recognise my whole self in Asuka.... not that old tho.... These days however, I feel more lost than our friend Shinji By the way, welcome to the forum....

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow » Tue Nov 08, 2005 5:36 pm thx, ppl i know always compare me to Rei cuz i hardly ever talk...

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Tue Nov 08, 2005 6:37 pm I can identify with Shinji a lot nowadays... :?

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 6:45 pm I feel as though I am Shinji and Sohruyuu almost every day... It just feels wierd... But, welcome.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Nov 08, 2005 8:59 pm wasnt there a similar thread on this? Something like "which evangelion character are you like?" Yeah, well. I act like Asuka, but I feel like Shinji most of the time. But, Asuka is kind of emo on the inside, too, ne?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Nov 08, 2005 9:11 pm Shinji hands down, some times I have no self confidence. Probly my worse fear is ending up like gendo my own weakenss hurting some one close to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Nov 08, 2005 9:18 pm Hm... This is an interesting question. Do I ever feel like I am in an Evangelion character's shoes? I really, really don't know. Back in my first wave of Evangelion obsession I forced myself to try and relate to Asuka best. I really was looking for someone, or something, that I could relate my own pain too... So I tried to use Asuka that way. Back then I did feel like I was in her shoes sometimes... But I was majorily fucked up as a kid. Still am fucked up by the way. Just in a different way. Now a days, since it's been far too long since my last wave of obsession with Evangelion, I don't think I could find myself in the shoes of any of the characters. Maybe someone else could point it out for me... Naw, I wont bore you all with it.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 10:34 pm Shnooks wrote: wasnt there a similar thread on this? Something like "which evangelion character are you like?" Yeah, well. I act like Asuka, but I feel like Shinji most of the time. But, Asuka is kind of emo on the inside, too, ne?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Nov 09, 2005 12:48 am Asuka's not emo. She's just scared of being alone. She's scared of her pride being stomped on.

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Wed Nov 09, 2005 12:56 am Eternal Yamcha wrote: Asuka's not emo. She's just scared of being alone. She's scared of her pride being stomped on.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Nov 09, 2005 1:13 am Yes, but how I was looking at it... She's more scared of having someone close to her. That's why she put up the defensive mechanism in the first place... Of course she's scared that someone will stomp on her pride... Though immediately, she'd turn to another defensive mechanism, trying to push the person away. But compared to the fear of having someone close to her, someone stomping on her pride just cannot get up to the same level. Yay! I make no sense!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 09, 2005 2:31 am Eternal Yamcha wrote: Asuka's not emo. She's just scared of being alone. She's scared of her pride being stomped on.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Nov 09, 2005 2:58 am Uh, yes, she is lonely. That's sort of the side effect for pushing people away, you don't let anyone near you. And to say she has no real peer group is only half correct. She does have a peer group, atleast according to the outside observer... But in her own mind, she doesn't, which is what counts most of the time.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Wed Nov 09, 2005 6:03 am The only person she never truly rejects, is Hikari. Thought her pride might be a defensive-self of hers, she'd like to be welcomed. But she wouldn't like to be welcomed, to get hurt, and she's scared of that. That's why she rejects others, like herself, as an EVA pilot. She doesn't want her pride to be stripped from her, even through her bad memories. Her crying, and mind-rape had the worst psychological affect on her, making her also feel that Ayanami is much better than Sohruyuu. That's how she is.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Wed Nov 09, 2005 6:24 am People compare me to Rei a lot, but I don't like her, so naturally, I'd disagree... I guess I'm a lot like Shinji sometimes. Or even Asuka, when she makes those blunt statements like "ANTA, BAKA?!" Reminds me of myself during school. :o

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Nov 09, 2005 6:24 am hikari is a sub-character, but I guess you are right I often find myself in Asuka......and Shinji..........and Rei

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Nov 09, 2005 10:08 am Mr. Tines wrote: You only have to look at the mind-rape scene, especially in the extended form in 22', to see the loneliness. The trouble is, she's alone in a crowd, having been the "special one" since being chosen as a pilot. She has no real peer group, so simply seeking someone like herself would be an impossibly high standard to apply to anyone. Which is, of course, why Shinji does her such psychological damage.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Wed Nov 09, 2005 12:51 pm I see a little bit of myself in Misato, Asuka, Shinji, and Rei. I think that's one of the biggest reasons I have fallen in love with this series. Apart from the beautiful character designs and great storyline, the characters' personalities stood out far more than any other series I have seen to date. I have seen other anime that have one or maybe two standout personalities but only Evangelion has managed to have multiple deep characters IMHO.
